# Dark Saga Art

> Independent artist brand making handmade ceramic tea pets and one-of-a-kind (OOAK) mixed-media art dolls. Every piece is hand-sculpted with no molds and no copies. The website is a portfolio/showcase; the works are sold through the brand's Etsy shop.

Dark Saga Art is the studio of a single maker who hand-sculpts collectible characters with a dark, whimsical, decadent-fantasy aesthetic. Two distinct product lines:

- **Tea pets** — small handmade ceramic figurines for the Chinese gongfu tea ceremony (gongfu cha). You pour tea over them during brewing; the clay matures and changes over time. They suit a chaxi (tea-tray scene) and Chinese/Japanese tea aesthetics. They are an author's alternative to traditional Yixing tea pets.
- **Art dolls** — poseable mixed-media OOAK art dolls (soft body on bead joints). Many are anthropomorphic / animal-headed creatures with hand-sculpted faces. NOTE: these are NOT ball-jointed dolls (BJD) and NOT fashion/Barbie-type dolls — they are mixed-media collectible art dolls.

The art dolls are divided into three series:
- **Bastards of the Fall** — dark, decadent fantasy creatures from forgotten realms.
- **Urban Misfits** — contemporary city spirits; slightly broken, slightly surreal.
- **Spores** — tiny pocket-sized portable companion dolls.

## Key facts
- Each piece is one of a kind (OOAK): no molds, no copies, hand-sculpted from clay and mixed media.
- The site is a brand showcase, not a shop. Prices, sizes, materials, shipping and availability live on Etsy.
- Worldwide shipping via Etsy.

## Where to buy / follow
- [Etsy shop](https://www.etsy.com/shop/DarkSagaArt): all available tea pets and art dolls, with prices and details.
- [Instagram @dark_saga_art](https://www.instagram.com/dark_saga_art): studio process and new releases.
- Contact: info@darksaga.art

## Site
- [Homepage](https://darksaga.art/): hero, Tea Spirits (tea pets), Art Dolls (three series), behind-the-scenes studio, collector reviews.
- [Tea Spirits](https://darksaga.art/tea-pets/): full gallery of handmade ceramic tea pets, each with its story.
- [Art Dolls](https://darksaga.art/art-dolls/): all three art-doll series — Bastards of the Fall, Urban Misfits, Spores.
